questionHtml:
What is produced when chlorobutane is treated with aqueous sodium hydroxide solution?

A.  butane

B.  butanoic acid

C.  butanal

D.  butan-1-ol

meta.title: What is produced when chlorobutane is treated with aqueous sodium hydroxide solution? A. butane B. butanoic acid C. butanal D. butan-1-ol
